Title: Register with valid credentials
Steps: Enter valid email, username, password (8+ chars). Press Register.
Expected Result: Account created and scene transitions to LobbyScene.

Title: Register with short password
Steps: Enter password shorter than 8 chars and press Register.
Expected Result: Registration blocked. User remains on login scene. Error shown in logs/UI.

Title: Login with valid credentials
Steps: Enter correct email and password then press Login.
Expected Result: Login succeeds and transitions to LobbyScene.

Title: Login with invalid password
Steps: Enter wrong password and press Login.
Expected Result: Login fails. User remains on login scene with error.

Title: Password reset request
Steps: Enter email and press Reset Password.
Expected Result: Reset request accepted. Success feedback/log appears.

Title: Connect to lobby
Steps: Wait for auto-connect.
Expected Result: State reaches Connected.InLobby. Region is eu.

Title: Create room with valid name
Steps: Enter room name and create room.
Expected Result: Room appears in list. Creator is master client.

Title: Create room with empty name
Steps: Leave name empty and attempt create.
Expected Result: Creation blocked. No invalid room created.

Title: Join existing room
Steps: On second client join room via list item.
Expected Result: Client joins same room successfully.

Title: Start match gating at 4 players
Steps: Join 4th player and check Start/Connect control on master and non-master.
Expected Result: Start control enabled only for master when count is 4.

Title: Master loads gameplay scene
Steps: Master presses Connect/Start.
Expected Result: All clients load Level_1 with synced scene transition.

Title: Local player ownership
Steps: Observe local character and controls.
Expected Result: Local character is controllable only on owning client.

Title: 4-player spawn placement
Steps: Observe all spawn locations at start.
Expected Result: All players spawn on valid ground not overlapping severely and not falling through world.

Title: Role assignment complete
Steps: Wait up to 10 seconds after all loaded.
Expected Result: Exactly 1 Priest and 3 Ghosts are assigned and reflected in visuals and HUD.

Title: No duplicate local spawn on re-entry
Steps: Rejoin room and load gameplay again.
Expected Result: Exactly one local player instance exists after rejoin.

Title: Movement and look for local player
Steps: Move with WASD and look with mouse.
Expected Result: Smooth movement and look for local player.

Title: Remote client cannot control other players
Steps: Try controlling remote observed character from local inputs.
Expected Result: Local input only controls owned character.

Title: Interact key near interactable
Steps: Press interact key.
Expected Result: Correct interaction triggers only when in range and role allows it.

Title: Local camera attachment
Steps: Observe camera after spawn and during first second.
Expected Result: Camera attaches to local player and remains stable.

Title: Priest damages Ghost
Preconditions: Priest and Ghost in line of sight
Steps: Priest fires at Ghost in range.
Expected Result: Ghost loses expected health (10 per hit default).

Title: Ghost damages Priest
Preconditions: Ghost and Priest in line of sight
Steps: Ghost fires at Priest in range.
Expected Result: Priest loses expected health (10 per hit default).

Title: Friendly fire blocked
Steps: Fire repeatedly at invalid role target.
Expected Result: No damage applied where role rules disallow it.

Title: Priest projectile range cap
Steps: Fire at distant target outside range.
Expected Result: No hit registered beyond Priest max range.

Title: Ghost projectile range cap
Steps: Fire at distant target outside range.
Expected Result: No hit registered beyond Ghost max range.

Title: Priest burst cooldown
Steps: Fire 5 quick shots and attempt 6th immediately.
Expected Result: 6th shot blocked until burst cooldown completes.

Title: Ghost burst cooldown
Steps: Fire 10 quick shots and attempt 11th immediately.
Expected Result: 11th shot blocked until burst cooldown completes.

Title: Ghost death and auto-respawn
Steps: Kill ghost and wait 3 seconds.
Expected Result: Ghost dies hides then respawns with restored health.

Title: Priest death spawns ash pot
Steps: Kill priest.
Expected Result: Priest dies and ash pot appears at death location.

Title: Ghost picks up ash pot
Steps: Ghost interacts to pick ash pot.
Expected Result: Ghost enters carrying state and pot no longer on ground.

Title: Ritual respawn at respawn point
Preconditions: Ghost carrying ash pot at PriestRespawnPoint
Steps: Stand in trigger and press ritual key.
Expected Result: Correct dead priest respawns at respawn point and carrying state clears.

Title: Priest disconnected before ritual
Steps: Try ritual with carried ash pot.
Expected Result: Ritual should fail safely with no crash or soft-lock.

Title: Connection state updates
Preconditions: In Lobby and then in room
Steps: Observe connection status text across transitions.
Expected Result: Status updates correctly (Connected.InLobby InRoom etc.).

Title: Role and health debug values update
Steps: Cause role assignment and damage events.
Expected Result: HUD reflects role and current health correctly.

Title: Pickup counters update
Preconditions: Collect flowers or souls where applicable
Steps: Observe count updates after pickup actions.
Expected Result: Counts increment and remain in sync with gameplay events.

Title: Crosshair local-only visibility
Steps: Compare local vs remote view of crosshair.
Expected Result: Crosshair shown only for local controlled player.

Title: Master disconnect during room or gameplay
Steps: Close master client unexpectedly.
Expected Result: New master elected room remains usable and no hard lock.

Title: Late join after gameplay started
Steps: Join room with a new client.
Expected Result: Late joiner syncs scene and state without broken role or ownership.

Title: Temporary network drop and recover
Steps: Briefly disconnect one client and reconnect.
Expected Result: Client either recovers cleanly or fails gracefully with clear UI state.

Title: Region consistency
Preconditions: Fresh launch with cleared PlayerPrefs recommended
Steps: Connect to lobby and observe region.
Expected Result: Region remains eu and does not drift to cached alternative.
